data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single Provenance resource by its unique identifier. data.current_description: Fetches a resource containing details of the Patient in CCDA format
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve patient clinical document in CCDA format
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a patient's clinical document in Consolidated Clinical Document Architecture (CCDA) format. CCDA is an XML-based standard for exchanging clinical documents. Requires patient identifier and optional parameters to filter the document. Returns the patient's clinical summary including demographics, conditions, medications, allergies, procedures, and observations in CCDA XML format.

data.current_description:
Fetches a bundled resource containing all the lab or radiology results for the patient mentioned in the request. The observations contained in the resource.  
 
 FHIR Resource: DocumentReference, DiagnosticReport 
 *  Imaging Narrative 
 *  Laboratory Report Narrative 
 *  Pathology Report Narrative 
 *  Procedure Note 
 
 FHIR Resource: Observation, DiagnosticReport 
 *  Tests 
 *  Values/Results
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all diagnostic reports for a patient
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a bundled collection of all diagnostic reports (lab results, radiology reports, pathology reports, and procedure notes) for a specified patient. Returns a FHIR Bundle containing DiagnosticReport and Observation resources with test values and clinical narratives. Requires patient identifier as input parameter. Supports filtering by date and status.
